# S003 Run 007

## Metadata

- Scenario ID: `S003`
- Scenario: `S003-async-gpu-remote-node-image`
- Status: pass
- Coordinator: Codex
- Executed: June 5, 2026
- Workspace: `contract-sim/workspaces/S003/`

## Purpose

Final focused rerun for the remaining C04/C08 artifact-list authorization
ambiguity from Run 006.

Only C04 and C08 were rerun. Each actor received only its local workspace folder
plus the S003 scenario.

## Constraint Gate

Run 007 used changes approved by a read-only constraint validator in Run 006:

- C04 authorizes `GET /v1/agent/jobs/{job_id}/artifacts` by first fetching C05
  job policy context, then asking C08 for `artifact.read` on
  `job_artifacts:{job_id}`.
- C04 calls C07 artifact listing only after C08 allows.
- C04 does not need artifact IDs before authorizing the list.
- C04 does not own or synthesize C07 artifact metadata.
- C08 treats `job_artifacts:{producer_ref}` as an opaque collection resource
  string and requires explicit owner context.

## Actor Results

| Actor | Status | Structure Check | Result |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `c04-agent-tool-gateway` | pass | pass | Artifact-list authorization is clear before artifact IDs are known; generic `policy_denied` fixture is usable. |
| `c08-access-policy-and-secrets` | pass | pass | Allows collection read with explicit owner context and denies missing context without inferring ownership. |

## Outcome

Pass. No remaining findings from the S003 bounded role-play loop.
